name: Ganesha
subtitle: Full Correspondences
summary: Ganesha breaker of closed roads — elephant dawn before the work begins.
flowText: Ganesha breaker of closed roads — elephant dawn before the work begins.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Citrine
related.teaser: Solar fire is the sovereign flame—the courage to act and become.

related.name: ♃ Jupiter
related.teaser: Jupiter is the thunder scepter — wheel of fate, king of sky, expansion of spirit.

related.name: Carnelian
related.teaser: Sacral is the river—pleasure, creation, and the moon’s pull in the blood.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: ᚠ Fehu
related.teaser: Fehu is wealth as movement — the warm herd that thrives when shared.

related.name: Five of Swords
related.teaser: Five of Swords is the blade of air — Friction reveals truth; growth through test.

related.name: Two of Swords
related.teaser: Two of Swords is the blade of air — Dual currents finding rhythm.

related.name: King of Swords
related.teaser: King of Swords is the blade of air — Set order and direction; steward the realm.

related.name: Six of Swords
related.teaser: Six of Swords is the blade of air — Reciprocity and grace; the current flows.
